calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request of default judgment against Defendant Norberto Martinez, Defendant Jonathan Martinez, and Defendant Reliable Acquisitions, LLC A Limited Liability Company.

Dept:505; Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:09:35 a.m. and concluding at 9:17:17 a.m.(D505)

Appearance/s by:
Leslie Holmes, Esq. representing Plaintiff Christopher Lockhart, who was present but did not testify via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel provides a summary for the request for default judgment against defendants.
Counsel to offer proof as to the requested punitive damages.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff is to recover from the Defendants as follows:

Damages $65,000.00
Punitive Damages $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $18,395.97
Attorney's Fees $6,900.00
Costs $951.31
Total Judgment $101,247.28

Proposed judgment as amended signed and executed this day.
